## INC_021 {#inc_021}

**Label:** Total household income before taxes - best estimate

**Position:** 1124, **Length:** 8

**Universe:**

> All respondents

**Question:**

> Now a question about your total household income. What is your best estimate of your total household income received by all household members, from all sources, before taxes and deductions, during the year ending De- cember 31, [current year - 1]? Income can come from various sources such as from work, investments, pensions or government. Examples include Employment Insurance, Social Assistance, Child Tax Benefit and other income such as child support, spousal support (alimony) and rental income.

**Categories:**

| Value | Label | Frequency |
|-------|-------|-----------|
| 0040027-16063292 | Amount in dollars                              - | 51,640 |
